topStories.description: Most Americans favor a swift end to US involvement in the conflict, according to a recent poll. The downing of an F-15E fighter jet in Iran led to one crew member's rescue, with ongoing concerns about potential US military personnel capture affecting public opinion.

topStories.title: Election petitions must be decided on the basis of material on record: Supreme Court
topStories.description: The order was based on an appeal challenging a February 2025 Punjab and Haryana High Court order on elections to the post of sarpanch of gram panchayat Khalila Majra at Panipat

topStories.title: 'Capture Enemy Pilots Alive': Iran Channel Issues Reward After US Jet Downed
topStories.description: An Iranian channel announced a reward for civilians if the pilots were captured and handed over to the police and military forces.

topStories.title: US rescues one crew member of F-15E fighter jet shot down by Iran; Tehran asks for civilian help: Report
topStories.description: According to the reports, Israel is helping the US with search and rescue operation of the crew member.

topStories.title: Watch: G.K. Vasan: Tamil Nadu missed central schemes as DMK treated BJP as ‘enemy’
topStories.description: GK Vasan, president of the Tamil Maanila Congress (Moopanar), speaks about the upcoming Assembly elections in Tamil Nadu. He talks about his party’s alliance with the BJP, why the country has rejected the Congress party and that the priority of the State should be safety, especially for women.

topStories.title: Congress calls delimitation move ‘dangerous,’ says women’s law amended to grab political mileage in polls
topStories.description: Congress President Mallikarjun Kharge and LoP in Lok Sabha Rahul Gandhi to meet party colleagues and other Opposition leaders to strategise for the special session, says Jairam Ramesh, adding the move to amend women’s quota law in the middle of elections violates model code

topStories.title: WHO Confirms Over 20 Strikes On Iranian Health Facilities As Global Alarm Grows
topStories.description: Neither the US nor Israel has publicly commented on the specific strikes against medical facilities.

topStories.description: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and "dehumanising".

topStories.description: The insurance expansion comes as a broader diplomatic push takes shape in parallel.

topStories.description: The Pentagon reportedly confirmed that George, who had more than a year left in his term, “will be retiring from his position as the 41st Chief of Staff of the Army effective immediately.”

dailyNews.title: US launches search and rescue operation after its F-15E fighter jet shot down in Iran amid ongoing conflict
dailyNews.description: Iran shot down a US F-15E fighter jet, marking the first combat loss of a US jet in the ongoing conflict. A rescue operation is underway for the crew, according to an US official. The Iranian state media posted map of Iran highlighting the area where two pilots are being hunted for since morning.

dailyNews.title: Trump seeks massive $1.5tn for defence alongside cuts in domestic spending
dailyNews.description: The president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.

dailyNews.title: US intelligence believes Iran still has ‘significant’ missile launching capabilities as the war continues
dailyNews.description: The US and Israel's Operation Epic Fury targets Iran's missile capabilities. After 35 days of conflict, US intelligence reveals that nearly half of Iran’s missile launchers remain, contradicting earlier assertions of extensive damage.

dailyNews.title: Rs 13,90,17,07,50,00,000: Amount White House Wants For Defence Amid Iran War
dailyNews.description: The proposal would lift Pentagon spending by more than 40 percent in a single year -- the sharpest increase since World War II -- as Washington seeks to sustain military operations and rebuild...

dailyNews.title: Cuba to release more than 2,000 prisoners as US pressure mounts
dailyNews.description: US President Trump has made clear his desire to change Cuba's leadership and has placed the country under an oil embargo.

dailyNews.title: 5 Indians among 12 injured in Abu Dhabi after falling debris hits Ajban area
dailyNews.description: Eight Indians have been killed and dozens more injured in countries across the region since the Israel and the US’s military strikes on Iran on February 28

dailyNews.title: ‘Hand over enemy pilot’: Iranian state TV affiliate claims a US pilot ejected from their aircraft over southwestern Iran
dailyNews.description: An on-screen crawl earlier urged the public to ‘shoot them if you see them,’ referring to social media footage circulating of what appeared to be US aircraft in the area, reports stated

dailyNews.title: US jobs surge unexpectedly in March despite Iran war
dailyNews.description: Employers added 178,000 jobs, far more than had expected, the Labor Department says.

dailyNews.title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
dailyNews.description: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth asks US Army's top general to step down
dailyNews.description: Gen Randy George was nominated for the role in 2023 by former President Joe Biden.

dailyNews.title: Al Sharpton touts Kamala Harris as ‘potent force in the Black community’ among potential 2028 Dem candidates
dailyNews.description: Al Sharpton touted Kamala Harris, a potential 2028 Democratic candidate, saying she's a "potent force" with Black voters and has been ignored going into the next cycle.

topStories.description: Karoline Leavitt says Karine Jean-Pierre struggled as White House press secretary due to a lack of open communication with President Joe Biden.

topStories.title: Trump cabinet shakeup expands after Noem exit, Bondi firing — who’s under pressure next?
topStories.description: After ousting Noem and Bondi, Trump may target more cabinet members ahead of crucial midterm elections where slim GOP majorities are at stake.

topStories.title: Trump eyes next attorney general as key GOP senator signals potential roadblock
topStories.description: President Donald Trump's firing of Attorney General Pam Bondi sets up another Senate confirmation battle, with Sen. Thom Tillis , R-N.C., drawing a firm line on Jan. 6.

topStories.title: Vanessa Trump breaks silence on social media with supportive message after Tiger Woods' DUI arrest
topStories.description: Vanessa Trump broke her silence on social media to show support for Tiger Woods following his DUI arrest in Florida and rollover car crash.

topStories.title: White House reacts to F-15E fighter jet downed over Iran
topStories.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says President Trump has been briefed after an American fighter jet was downed in Iran. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

topStories.title: Trump's 2027 budget asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending
topStories.description: President Trump's new budget proposal asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending — a 42% increase — while cutting nondefense spending by $73 billion, or 10%.

topStories.title: Rival Nations Seize On Choke Points to Counter Trump
topStories.description: From Iran to China, President Trump’s global aggression has encouraged other countries to search for new ways to pressure the U.S. economy.

topStories.title: Pam Bondi Wanted a Graceful Exit. But Trump Wanted Her Gone.
topStories.description: Pam Bondi had a feeling her days as attorney general were numbered. But she didn’t expect President Trump to drop the curtain quite so soon.

topStories.title: Who Is Todd Blanche, Trump’s Acting Attorney General?
topStories.description: While it remains unclear how long Todd Blanche will stay in the job, whoever ends up taking over permanently will lead a department that he has shaped in his own image.

dailyNews.title: Liberal Group Warns That Trump Could Have Two More Supreme Court Picks
dailyNews.description: Demand Justice plans to tie Republicans running for Senate this year to a possible fight to fill vacancies that could emerge on the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
dailyNews.description: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's Iran speech ignores the risks of a return to the 1970s
dailyNews.description: Oil shocks crippled past presidencies. The Iran war is putting Trump into the danger zone.

dailyNews.title: One year on from Trump's 'liberation day,' global investors are rethinking American exceptionalism
dailyNews.description: U.S. exceptionalism is "no longer automatic" among global investors, one market watcher told CNBC.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: White House asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion for defense in new budget request
dailyNews.description: The White House is asking Congress to approve roughly $1.5 trillion for defense -- a record-breaking amount as the U.S. remains in its fifth week of war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: As Trump rails against NATO, secretary general heads to Washington
dailyNews.description: NATO’s secretary general is heading to the White House next week as President Donald Trump lashes out over European allies’ refusal to join the U.S. and Israel’s war with Iran.
